notes: Output captures rough mantle silhouettes of three of the photo's squids but is essentially an edge-detection trace with broken fragments instead of clean FAO ink work, and arms/tentacles are largely missing.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles almost entirely missing from all squids
linework is fragmented edge-trace clutter, not continuous single-weight ink
no organized stipple — just disconnected noise marks where chromatophores/shadows are
eyes are tiny dots without proper almond shape
fin geometry barely indicated, fin-mantle junction unclear
photo contains 4–5 squids but output only renders 3 mantles
broken silhouette — outline drops out in places along mantle edges
reads as photo edge-filter output rather than a scientific cephalopod plate
no hectocotylus, sucker rings, or any anatomical detail expected of FAO style
